title: Postgresql MCP Server - MCP Servers
detailMarkdown:
# Postgresql MCP Server - MCP Servers
Official MCP server providing read-only access to PostgreSQL databases with schema inspection and query capabilities
**Category:** mcp
**Author:** Anthropic
**Download trust:** first-party
**Tags:** `postgresql` `database` `sql` `official` `anthropic`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status postgres
```

## Config
```json
{
  "postgres": {
    "args": [
      "-y",
      "@modelcontextprotocol/server-postgres",
      "postgresql://localhost/mydb"
    ],
    "command": "npx"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status postgres

- https://heyclau.de/mcp/postgresql-mcp-server
